# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  # Restrict variable expansion to prevent injection
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone
  GIT_DEPTH: "1"
  # Disable features that could be exploited
  FF_SCRIPT_SECTIONS: "true"
  FF_DISABLE_UMASK_FOR_DOCKER_EXECUTOR: "true"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

default:
  tags:
    - shared
  timeout: 30m
  interruptible: true

# Validate build scripts exist and are safe before execution
validate-scripts:
  stage: validate
  image: alpine:3.19
  script:
    - |
      echo "Validating build configuration..."

      # Ensure build script exists in the repository
      if [ ! -f "./ci/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: ./ci/build.sh not found in repository"
        exit 1
      fi

      # Verify scripts are tracked by git (not injected)
      git ls-files --error-unmatch ./ci/build.sh
      if [ -f "./ci/test.sh" ]; then
        git ls-files --error-unmatch ./ci/test.sh
      fi
      if [ -f "./ci/deploy.sh" ]; then
        git ls-files --error-unmatch ./ci/deploy.sh
      fi

      # Check for suspicious patterns in build scripts
      # Prevent credential exfiltration and reverse shells
      SUSPICIOUS_PATTERNS="curl.*\\\$CI_JOB_TOKEN|wget.*\\\$CI_JOB_TOKEN|nc -e|/dev/tcp|mkfifo|base64.*eval|eval.*base64|\\\$\{!|printenv|env > |set > |export.*>|CI_JOB_TOKEN|CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD|PRIVATE_TOKEN"

      for script_file in ./ci/*.sh; do
        if [ -f "$script_file" ]; then
          echo "Scanning $script_file for suspicious patterns..."
          if grep -qEi "$SUSPICIOUS_PATTERNS" "$script_file"; then
            echo "ERROR: Suspicious pattern detected in $script_file"
            echo "Scripts must not exfiltrate credentials or open reverse shells"
            grep -nEi "$SUSPICIOUS_PATTERNS" "$script_file" || true
            exit 1
          fi

          # Ensure no SUID/SGID manipulation
          if grep -qE "chmod\s+[0-7]*[4-7][0-7]{2}\s|chmod\s+[ug]\+s" "$script_file"; then
            echo "ERROR: SUID/SGID manipulation detected in $script_file"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "$script_file passed validation"
        fi
      done

      echo "All build scripts validated successfully"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

build:
  stage: build
  image: ${BUILD_IMAGE:-docker:24-dind}
  needs:
    - validate-scripts
  before_script:
    - |
      # Mask sensitive variables from job logs
      # Restrict network access if possible
      echo "Setting up secure build environment..."

      # Remove unnecessary credentials from environment
      unset CI_JOB_TOKEN 2>/dev/null || true
      unset CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD 2>/dev/null || true
      unset DOCKER_AUTH_CONFIG 2>/dev/null || true

      # Set restrictive umask
      umask 0077

      # Ensure build script has correct permissions (not world-writable)
      if [ "$(stat -c '%a' ./ci/build.sh 2>/dev/null || stat -f '%Lp' ./ci/build.sh 2>/dev/null)" = "777" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Build script has insecure permissions"
        exit 1
      fi

      chmod 0755 ./ci/build.sh
  script:
    - /bin/sh ./ci/build.sh
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
    expire_in: 1 week
    when: on_success
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

test:
  stage: test
  image: ${TEST_IMAGE:-alpine:3.19}
  needs:
    - validate-scripts
    - build
  before_script:
    - |
      echo "Setting up secure test environment..."
      unset CI_JOB_TOKEN 2>/dev/null || true
      unset CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD 2>/dev/null || true
      umask 0077

      if [ ! -f "./ci/test.sh" ]; then
        echo "No test script found, skipping"
        exit 0
      fi
      chmod 0755 ./ci/test.sh
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "./ci/test.sh" ]; then
        /bin/sh ./ci/test.sh
      else
        echo "No custom test script provided, skipping tests"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - reports/
    reports:
      junit: reports/*.xml
    expire_in: 30 days
    when: always
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: ${DEPLOY_IMAGE:-alpine:3.19}
  needs:
    - validate-scripts
    - build
    - test
  before_script:
    - |
      echo "Setting up secure deploy environment..."
      umask 0077

      if [ ! -f "./ci/deploy.sh" ]; then
        echo "No deploy script found, skipping"
        exit 0
      fi

      # Extra validation for deploy scripts - they are higher risk
      if grep -qEi "rm\s+-rf\s+/[^.]|dd\s+if=|mkfs\.|fdisk" "./ci/deploy.sh"; then
        echo "ERROR: Destructive system commands detected in deploy script"
        exit 1
      fi

      chmod 0755 ./ci/deploy.sh
  script:
    - |
      if [ -f "./ci/deploy.sh" ]; then
        /bin/sh ./ci/deploy.sh
      else
        echo "No custom deploy script provided, skipping deployment"
      fi
  environment:
    name: ${DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT:-production}
    url: ${DEPLOY_URL:-""}
  rules:
    # Only deploy from default branch or tags, never from MRs
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
      when: never
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
      when: manual
      allow_failure: false

# Security scanning of the build scripts themselves
sast-build-scripts:
  stage: validate
  image: alpine:3.19
  script:
    - |
      echo "Running static analysis on CI scripts..."
      apk add --no-cache shellcheck

      EXIT_CODE=0
      for script_file in ./ci/*.sh; do
        if [ -f "$script_file" ]; then
          echo "Checking $script_file with shellcheck..."
          shellcheck -S warning "$script_file" || EXIT_CODE=1
        fi
      done

      exit $EXIT_CODE
  allow_failure: true
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
      changes:
        - ci/**/*
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      changes:
        - ci/**/*
